text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I don't know why, but I feel like...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I feel like I can do really well today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, what am I saying? C'mon, Nature! Don't jinx
it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Don't make it worse! I'm just feeling good is all...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But don't get your hopes up too high. Just... If it
goes well, it goes well!
